retrieved_result: Livermore (in Larimer County, CO) Populated Place Profile Real Estate Resources Larimer County Land, Farms, & Ranches Livermore ( GNIS FID: 170174) is a populated place located in Larimer County at latitude 40.794 and longitude -105.217. The elevation of Livermore is 5,896 feet. Livermore appears on the Livermore U. S. Geological Survey Map. Larimer County
